requirement_topic.en: Transport safety: UN 38.3 and landlocked transit via Thailand or Vietnam
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全：UN 38.3及经泰国或越南中转的内陆运输
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全：UN 38.3及經泰國或越南中轉的內陸運輸

summary.en: Lithium batteries shipped to Laos remain UN Class 9 dangerous goods. Each cell and battery type should have a UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3 test result and a UN 38.3 Test Summary. Because Laos is landlocked, many shipments move by land after transit through Thailand or Vietnam, so exporters must align packaging, marks, labels, safety data, and shipping papers with the chosen route, carrier rules, and any transit-country dangerous-goods controls before final import into Laos.
summary.zh: 运往老挝的锂电池仍属UN第9类危险品。每种电芯和电池型号应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节测试结果及UN 38.3测试摘要。由于老挝为内陆国，许多货物经泰国或越南中转后陆路进入，因此出口商必须按所选路线、承运人规则及中转国危险品管控，对齐包装、标记、标签、安全资料及运输单证，之后再完成老挝最终进口。
summary.zht: 運往寮國的鋰電池仍屬UN第9類危險品。每種電芯和電池型號應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節測試結果及UN 38.3測試摘要。由於寮國為內陸國，許多貨物經泰國或越南中轉後陸路進入，因此出口商必須按所選路線、承運人規則及中轉國危險品管控，對齊包裝、標記、標籤、安全資料及運輸單證，之後再完成寮國最終進口。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3
UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Model Regulations, Class 9
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions where air transport is used
IMDG Code and transit-country dangerous-goods controls where sea-plus-land routing via Thailand or Vietnam is used

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly already hold UN 38.3 Test Summaries and dangerous-goods classification or transport appraisal reports for lithium battery export. These are useful and often portable, but the Laos route still requires route-specific documents for the carrier, transit country, and final importer.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常已持有UN 38.3测试摘要及用于锂电池出口的危险品分类或运输鉴定报告。这些文件有用且通常具可转移性，但老挝路线仍需按承运人、中转国和最终进口商要求准备路线特定文件。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常已持有UN 38.3測試摘要及用於鋰電池出口的危險品分類或運輸鑑定報告。這些文件有用且通常具可轉移性，但寮國路線仍需按承運人、中轉國和最終進口商要求準備路線特定文件。

standards_or_laws: Dangerous-goods classification or transport appraisal report for China export

gap.en: UN 38.3 is the closest alignment point between China and Laos. The remaining gap is logistics execution: the test summary must match the exact model, and the route via Thailand or Vietnam may create additional transit documentation and carrier packaging requirements before Laos import clearance.
gap.zh: UN 38.3是中国与老挝之间最接近对齐的环节。剩余差距在物流执行：测试摘要必须匹配确切型号，经泰国或越南的路线可能在老挝进口清关前产生额外中转文件及承运人包装要求。
gap.zht: UN 38.3是中國與寮國之間最接近對齊的環節。剩餘差距在物流執行：測試摘要必須匹配確切型號，經泰國或越南的路線可能在寮國進口清關前產生額外中轉文件及承運人包裝要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for carriage of lithium batteries; route-specific carrier, transit-country, and Laos import requirements must be confirmed.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for lithium battery export carriage; UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods documents commonly required.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 as the transport anchor, then validate the Thailand or Vietnam transit route, carrier packaging rules, and Laos importer documents before dispatch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输应以UN 38.3为核心依据，并在发货前核实泰国或越南中转路线、承运人包装规则及老挝进口商文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸應以UN 38.3為核心依據，並在發貨前核實泰國或越南中轉路線、承運人包裝規則及寮國進口商文件。
